page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfg8i.xlarge is a general-purpose virtual machine instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features an Intel Xeon 6462C processor built on the x86_64 architecture. The instance is configured with 4 dedicated virtual CPUs, mapping directly to 4 physical cores with 1.0 thread per core, indicating that hyperthreading is disabled. The processor operates at a clock speed of 3.3 GHz, providing consistent compute performance.

The system is equipped with 16.0 GB of system memory, yielding a balanced allocation of 4.0 GB of RAM per CPU core. This 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio aligns with standard general-purpose computing requirements. The instance does not include local storage or integrated GPU hardware, meaning all storage requirements must be met via network-attached block storage. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 4 Gbps, and the instance does not include complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

Given the dedicated core configuration and 3.3 GHz clock speed, this instance offers stable compute performance without resource contention from hyperthreading. It is suitable for workloads such as web serving, application servers, microservices, and moderate database hosting where predictable CPU performance and a balanced memory footprint are required.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfg8i.xlarge is a general-purpose virtual machine instance configured with 4 dedicated vCPUs and 16.0 GB of system memory. Powered by an Intel Xeon 6462C processor running at 3.3 GHz on the x86_64 architecture, the instance allocates one physical core per vCPU with hyperthreading disabled. This hardware profile provides a balanced 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio, delivering predictable compute performance for non-burstable workloads. The instance does not feature local storage or GPU accelerators, relying entirely on network-attached storage, and provides a baseline network bandwidth of 4 Gbps. It is engineered for workloads requiring dedicated processing resources, such as application servers, containerized microservices, and general-purpose web serving.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfg8i.xlarge is a general-purpose instance featuring 4 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs at 3.3 GHz, 16 GB RAM, and 4 Gbps network bandwidth, ideal for predictable application workloads.

tagline: A dedicated four-core virtual server with balanced memory and predictable compute performance for general-purpose enterprise workloads.

16.0 GB of system memory providing a balanced 1:4 resource ratio
3.3 GHz clock speed with hyperthreading disabled for predictable performance
No local storage or GPU hardware included
Suitable for web serving, application servers, and microservices
